violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Boxes of worms are being stored in the same refrigerator at other foods items.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single-use items being stored underneath the sink.--Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Re-using single use spoons to dispense condiments by the hotdog rolling station.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. There is not a designated hand sink. The only sinks near the kitchen area is the three compartment sink.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of brats and pizzas were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. There is not a designated hand sink. The only sinks near the kitchen area is the three compartment sink. Employee stated that the sink was removed when someone struck the building.
